name: Snake
meaning: a twisting path conceals a defect — review the indirection.

name: Tower
meaning: the change rises taller than it should — fragile under merge winds.

name: Ring
meaning: a cycle closes — this PR ties off something long open.

name: Star
meaning: a small bright change that points the way forward.

name: Crescent
meaning: only half a story is told — expect a follow-up PR.

name: Spiral
meaning: the work coils inward — refactor energy, not new value.

name: Path
meaning: a clean line forward — focused, easy to follow.

name: Crossroads
meaning: competing directions in one diff — split or commit to one.

name: Anchor
meaning: ground is laid — something to build on later.

name: Cloud
meaning: intent is hazy — reviewers will need to squint.

name: Mountain
meaning: a heavy lift — guard against reviewer fatigue.

name: Drop
meaning: a tiny ripple — merge swiftly before it goes stale.

name: Tree
meaning: the change branches outward across the tree.

name: Lightning
meaning: an abrupt strike — fast, but may shock dependents.

name: Scales
meaning: additions and deletions weigh evenly — a measured trade.

name: Knife
meaning: code is cut away — confirm nothing downstream still calls it.

name: Bird
meaning: a small announcement carried abroad — docs or comments lead.

name: Heart
meaning: tender attention — a small kindness to the codebase.

name: Key
meaning: something previously locked is opened — a new door.

name: Web
meaning: threads cross many files — a delicate weave to merge.
